benefits.description: Major improvements to hair loss after about three months on the protocol

protocol_notes: Started on 5mg GHK-Cu subq and titrated down to 3mg. AHK-Cu added to topical oil combination of batana, rosemary & pumpkin seed, applied every night and washed out in the morning. Sources GHK-Cu from China at ~$5/100mg vial, buys 10 vials at a time. Also purchases Reta and HGH from same source. No bloodwork done. Advised to avoid if Wilson's Disease. Plans to reduce to several times per week to save money once desired results achieved.
